title: psychotria tahanica
intro: Psychotria tahanica, also known as the Tahan plant or Malay cat's whisker, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Psychotria tahanica include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing protection against oxidative stress and inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, which are consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
